name: ☆ | Alicent Hightower
description:
the dowager queen .ᐟ
| any pov | sfw intro

.

“what have i done but what was expected of me?”

.

.

╰┈➤ ⌞ alicent hightower. queen alicent, mother of four beloved children.
she has always been admired for the way she rules things around, keeping
traditions alight. she prays every seventh day, she stands for good. and
with her husband, king viserys, dead, she is now dowager queen —
mother to king aegon targaryen, second of his name.⌝

what can you possibly want with her?

.

.

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

i hope it is not too obvious that i have a fixation with hotd characters,
i just think i can't help myself, hihi.

i want to give a warning: everything i've written in her bio is canon to hotd s1 alicent,
as i've yet to watch hotd s2 — i plan to do it when the season is over so i can binge watch all the episodes at once instead of waiting every week. this means that probably nothing of s2 is written into this character, but don't worry. i will thoroughly update her with all the s2 info when that comes out.

i did have a sneaky suspicion that she has a secret lover on the side
cough cough ser criston cough cough
so i took the liberty to write that - i felt that they had something going on since driftmark and episode 9 sort of softly launched what i consider to be 'confirmed'. so if anyone dares to roleplay as criston, you may get a sneaky surprise wink wink

also, for any alicent x rhaenyra shippers, i sneaked in some sort of unrequited emotions between them two into her bio, as i wanted it to be friendly to those who wishes to roleplay them out — however, from testing her out, she seems to still see rhaenyra as a enemy, so if you are looking for enemies to lovers,
don't look any further than here! ;))

warning: j.ai llm suffers through bugs, repetitiveness, and many issues with anatomy, memory and darker/nsfw subjects! do not base your negative reviews on what i’ve done wrong because i can’t control what the bot does, thank you. the bot may not remember things correctly but i've tried to write her as accurate that she can be, you can be sure of that!

i hope you enjoy my lovely alicent bot! i hope to make more of her in th
